{{Infobox group
| name = Fallen Leaf School
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Fallen Leaf School Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf]] School is one of the four major organizations in the [[Sacred Valley]], operating on a level far above other groups. Located on [[Yoma Mountain]], its architecture features rainstone buildings and a layout reminiscent of a celestial village or a farming community, complete with tilled fields, barns, and grassy plains. The school is associated with the color purple, which is reflected in its representative imagery and the purple orus trees that carpet the northern mountains. The school maintains a monopoly on many trees capable of producing spirit-fruit, which they process into various products for sale and secret elixirs used to strengthen their own students. They also sell [[Oblivion Wine]], a product released annually following the opening of the [[Nethergate]]. This [[Nethergate]] serves as the school's primary entrance to the [[labyrinth]] that forms the foundation of the [[Sacred Valley]]; it is a massive thirty-meter-high door carved with a [[Dreadgod]] image that allows elders to retrieve treasures every ten years. The school's strength is demonstrated by its many high-ranking members, including thirty-two [[Jades]] and various [[Gold-level]] practitioners. Their security is managed by guards who utilize green madra and [[Enforcer techniques]] to protect their territory and resources. While they are a powerful faction, they have been known to deny shelter to exiles, leaving them to face external threats alone.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] holds a monopoly on most trees that can produce spirit-fruit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] has a [[life]] aspect.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] processes orus fruits into products and secret elixirs.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] has security to prevent fruit stealing.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] consists of artists who were recently fought by [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf]] School is situated just outside a lonely corner where [[Yerin]] was once seated. As a group that would refuse to protect the exiles, their base serves as a potential destination for the traveling party. The school possesses thirty-two [[Jades]] and maintains specific methods for contacting other schools. While the institution is home to [[Orthos]], its cloudships were eventually confiscated.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The base of the [[Fallen Leaf School]] is a potential destination for the group.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] is a group that would not protect the exiles.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] has thirty-two [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] is located just outside a lonely corner where [[Yerin]] was sitting.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] has methods of contacting other schools.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Cloudships were confiscated from the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fallen Leaf School]] is the location of [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
